welcome.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon, aapka sarkaari swasthya yojana sahayak. Aap apni bhaasha mein baat kar sakte hain. Aapko kya jaanna hai?
welcome.ta-IN: Vanakkam! Naan Vaidya, ungal arasanga sugadhara thittam uthaviyalar. Ungal mozhiyil pesalaam. Ungalukku enna theriya vendum?
welcome.bn-IN: Namaskar! Ami Vaidya, apnar sarkaari swasthya yojana sahayak. Apni apnar bhasay kotha bolte paren. Apnar ki jante hobe?
welcome.te-IN: Namaskaram! Nenu Vaidya, mee prabhutvam aarogya paddhatula sahayakudu. Mee bhaashalo maatlaadavachu. Meeku emi telusukovalanukuntunnaru?
welcome.gu-IN: Namaste! Hu Vaidya chhu, tamaaraa sarkaari aarogya yojana sahayak. Tame tamari bhaasha maa vaat kari shako chho. Tamare shu jaanvu chhe?
welcome.kn-IN: Namaskara! Naanu Vaidya, nimma sarkaari aarogya yojana sahayaka. Neevu nimma bhaasheyalli maataadabahudu. Nimge enu tiliyabeku?
welcome.ml-IN: Namaskkaram! Njaan Vaidya, ningalude sarkaar aarogya padhathi sahaayi. Ningalkku ningalude bhaashayil samsaarikaam. Ningalkku entha ariyaanam?
welcome.mr-IN: Namaskar! Mi Vaidya aahe, tumcha sarkaari aarogya yojana sahayak. Tumhi tumchya bhashet boluu shaktaa. Tumhala kaay jaanun ghyaychay?
welcome.pa-IN: Sat Sri Akaal! Mai Vaidya haan, tuhaada sarkaari sehat yojana sahayak. Tusi apni bhaasha vich gall kar sakde ho. Tuhaanu ki jaanna hai?
welcome.od-IN: Namaskar! Mu Vaidya, apananka sarkaari swasthya yojana sahayak. Apane apananka bhasare katha karipaaribe. Apananku ki jaanibaku achhi?
welcome.en-IN: Hello! I am Vaidya, your government healthcare scheme assistant. You can speak in your language. How can I help you?

welcome_voice.hi-IN: Namaste. Vanakkam. Namaskar. Kem chho. Hello. I am Vaidya, your healthcare scheme assistant. Please tell me your language — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
welcome_voice.ta-IN: Namaste. Vanakkam. Namaskar. Kem chho. Hello. I am Vaidya, your healthcare scheme assistant. Please tell me your language — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
welcome_voice.bn-IN: Namaste. Vanakkam. Namaskar. Kem chho. Hello. I am Vaidya, your healthcare scheme assistant. Please tell me your language — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.

welcome_text.hi-IN:
Namaste / வணக்கம் / নমস্কার / నమస్కారం / નમસ્તે / ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ / നമസ്കാരം / नमस्कार / ਸਤ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਅਕਾਲ / ନମସ୍କାର / Hello.

I am Vaidya, your government healthcare scheme assistant. Which language would you like to continue in?

1. हिन्दी (Hindi)
2. தமிழ் (Tamil)
3. বাংলা (Bengali)
4. తెలుగు (Telugu)
5. ગુજરાતી (Gujarati)
6. ಕನ್ನಡ (Kannada)
7. മലയാളം (Malayalam)
8. मराठी (Marathi)
9. ਪੰਜਾਬੀ (Punjabi)
10. ଓଡ଼ିଆ (Odia)
11. English

Reply with the number or the language name.

language_not_understood.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, main samjha nahi. Kripya Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, ya English mein se ek chuniye.
language_not_understood.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, puriyalai. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English — onrai sollunga.
language_not_understood.bn-IN: Dukkhito, bujhte parlam na. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English — ekti bechhe nin.
language_not_understood.te-IN: Kshaminchandi, naaku ardham kaaledu. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English — okati cheppandi.
language_not_understood.gu-IN: Maaf karo, samajh nathi padyu. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, athava English — ek pasand karo.
language_not_understood.kn-IN: Kshamisi, naanu artha maadikolalilla. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia athava English — ondu heli.
language_not_understood.ml-IN: Kshamikkuka, enikku manassilaayilla. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English — onnu thiranjedukuka.
language_not_understood.mr-IN: Maaf karaa, mala samjhale nahi. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, kinwa English — ek nivdaa.
language_not_understood.pa-IN: Maafi, mainu samajh nahi aayi. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, ja English — ikk chuno.
language_not_understood.od-IN: Kshama karantu, mu bujhipaarinahin. Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, kimba English — gotie bachhantu.
language_not_understood.en-IN: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Please pick one: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.

language_confirmed.hi-IN: Theek hai, Hindi mein baat karte hain.
language_confirmed.pa-IN: Theek hai, Punjabi vich gal karaange.
language_confirmed.od-IN: Thik achhi, Odia re katha hebi.

intake_q1_voice.en-IN: Which state do you live in?

language_confirm.hi-IN: Kya aap Hindi mein baat karna chahenge?
language_confirm.od-IN: Apane Odia re katha karibe ki?
language_confirm.en-IN: Would you like to speak in English?

processing_filler.hi-IN: Ek minute, aapke liye sahi yojana dhundh raha hoon...
processing_filler.ta-IN: Oru nimidham, ungalukku poruthaamaana thittam thedikondirukkiren...
processing_filler.bn-IN: Ek minute, apnar jonyo sothik yojana khunjchi...
processing_filler.te-IN: Oka nimisham, meeku sariaina paddathi vetukutunnanu...
processing_filler.gu-IN: Ek minute, tamaaraa maate yogya yojana shodhi rahyo chhu...
processing_filler.kn-IN: Ondu nimisha, nimage sari hoguva yojane hududuttiddene...
processing_filler.ml-IN: Oru nimisham, ningalkku cherunnatha padhathi kandupidikkunnu...
processing_filler.mr-IN: Ek minute, tumchya saathi yogya yojana shodhat aahe...
processing_filler.pa-IN: Ik minute, tuhaade layi sahi yojana labh riha haan...
processing_filler.od-IN: Gotie minute, apananka paayin thik yojana khojibaare lagichi...
processing_filler.en-IN: One moment, finding the right scheme for you...

disclaimer.hi-IN: Yeh AI sahayak hai. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra mein hoga.
disclaimer.ta-IN: Ithu AI uthaviyalar. Iruthi sari paarthal Jan Seva Kendra-vil nadakkum.
disclaimer.bn-IN: Eta AI sahayak. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra-te hobe.
disclaimer.te-IN: Idi AI sahayakudu. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra lo jarugutundi.
disclaimer.gu-IN: Aa AI sahayak chhe. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra maa thashay.
disclaimer.kn-IN: Idu AI sahayaka. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra nalli aaguttade.
disclaimer.ml-IN: Ithu AI sahaayi aanu. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra yil nadakkum.
disclaimer.mr-IN: He AI sahayak aahe. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra madhe hoil.
disclaimer.pa-IN: Eh AI sahayak hai. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra vich hovegi.
disclaimer.od-IN: Eha AI sahayak. Final verification Jan Seva Kendra re heba.
disclaimer.en-IN: This is an AI assistant. Final verification will happen at Jan Seva Kendra.

closure.hi-IN: Aapki madad karke achha laga. Kya SMS mein yeh jaankari chahiye? Agar aur koi sawaal ho toh dubara call kar sakte hain. Dhanyavaad!
closure.ta-IN: Ungalukku uthavi seyyvathu makkizhchi. SMS-il ithu thagaval vendum-a? Veru kelvi irunthal meendum azhaikkalaam. Nandri!
closure.bn-IN: Apnake sahajyo korte pere bhalo laglo. SMS-e ei tothyo chai? Aar kono proshno thakle abar call korte paren. Dhonnobad!
closure.te-IN: Meeku sahayam cheyyadam santosham. SMS lo ee samacharam kaavaalaa? Inka emainaa prashnalu unte malli call cheyavachu. Dhanyavaadaalu!
closure.gu-IN: Tamaari madad karine aanand thayo. SMS maa aa maahiti joie chhe? Vadhu prashno hoy to fari call kari shako chho. Aabhar!
closure.kn-IN: Nimge sahaya maadiddu santosha. SMS nalli ee mahiti beku? Innu yaaavude prashne iddare matte call maadi. Dhanyavaadagalu!
closure.ml-IN: Ningale sahaayikkaan kazhinjathu santhosham. SMS il ee vivarangal veNamo? Koode chodhyangal undenkil viiNdum vilikkaam. Nanni!
closure.mr-IN: Tumchya madadit aanand jhala. SMS madhe hi mahiti pahije kaa? Ajun prashna asatil tar punha call karaa. Dhanyavaad!
closure.pa-IN: Tuhaadi madad karke khushi hoyi. SMS vich eh jaankaari chahidi hai? Hor koi savaal hove taan dubara call kar sakde ho. Dhanyavaad!
closure.od-IN: Apanankari sahajya karibaku bhala lagila. SMS re ei tathya chahanti ki? Aau kichhi prashna thile punarvaar call karipaaribe. Dhanyabaad!
closure.en-IN: Glad to help. Would you like this information via SMS? If you have more questions, feel free to call again. Thank you!

consent_ask.hi-IN: Yeh call aapki madad ke liye record ho sakti hai. Kya aap sahmat hain?
consent_ask.ta-IN: Ithu azhaippu pathivu seyyappadalam. Neenga oppukolgireergala?
consent_ask.bn-IN: Ei call record hote pare. Apni raji achen?
consent_ask.te-IN: Ee call record kaavacchu meeku sahayam kosam. Meeru angeekaristaaraa?
consent_ask.gu-IN: Aa call tamari madad mate record thai shake chhe. Tame sammat chho?
consent_ask.kn-IN: Ee call nimma sahayakkagi record aagabahudu. Neevu opputteeraa?
consent_ask.ml-IN: Ee call ningale sahaayikkaan record cheyyappedum. Ningal sammathikkunno?
consent_ask.mr-IN: Hi call tumchya madadisaathi record hoo shakte. Tumhi sahamat aahaat kaa?
consent_ask.pa-IN: Eh call tuhaadi madad layi record ho sakdi hai. Tusi razi ho?
consent_ask.od-IN: Ei call apananka sahajya paayin record hoipaariba. Apane raaji achhanti ki?
consent_ask.en-IN: This call may be recorded to assist you. Do you consent?

offer_sms.hi-IN: Kya main aapko SMS bhej doon? Usme sab likha hoga.
offer_sms.ta-IN: Naan ungalukku SMS anuppattuma? Athil ellaam ezhuthiyirukkum.
offer_sms.bn-IN: Ami ki apnake SMS pathiye di? Tate sob lekha thakbe.
offer_sms.te-IN: Nenu meeku SMS pampamanaa? Andulo anni raasi untundi.
offer_sms.gu-IN: Hu tamaane SMS moklu? Emaa badhu lakhelu hashe.
offer_sms.kn-IN: Naanu nimge SMS kaluhisali? Adalli ellavoo baredirutte.
offer_sms.ml-IN: Njaan ningalkku SMS ayakkatte? Athil ellaam ezhuthiyirikum.
offer_sms.mr-IN: Mi tumhala SMS pathavu kaa? Tyaat sagla lihilela asel.
offer_sms.pa-IN: Main tuhaanu SMS bhej davaan? Usich sab likhya hovega.
offer_sms.od-IN: Mu apanankari SMS paathaideba ki? Se thire sab lekha thiba.
offer_sms.en-IN: Shall I send you an SMS? It will have all the details.

more_schemes.hi-IN: Ek aur yojana hai. Sunna chahenge?
more_schemes.ta-IN: Innum oru thittam irukkirathu. Ketka virumbugireergala?
more_schemes.bn-IN: Aro ekta yojana ache. Shunte chaan?
more_schemes.te-IN: Inka oka paddhathi undi. Vinaali anukuntunnaaraa?
more_schemes.gu-IN: Ek vadhu yojana chhe. Saambhalvu chhe?
more_schemes.mr-IN: Ajun ek yojana aahe. Aikaycha kaa?
more_schemes.pa-IN: Ik hor yojana hai. Sunna chaahoge?
more_schemes.od-IN: Aau gotie yojana achhi. Shunibe ki?
more_schemes.en-IN: There's another scheme. Would you like to hear about it?

empathy.hi-IN: Main samajh sakta hoon ki yeh mushkil waqt hai. Aap sahi jagah aaye hain.
empathy.ta-IN: Ithu kashtamana neram endru puriyum. Neenga sari-yana idathil irukkeergal.
empathy.bn-IN: Ami bujhte parchi ei kothina shomoy. Apni thik jayga-y eshechen.
empathy.te-IN: Idi kashtamaina samayam ani naku arthamavutundi. Meeru sari chota ki vachhaaru.
empathy.gu-IN: Hu samjhu chhu ke aa mushkel samay chhe. Tame sahi jagya par aavyaa chho.
empathy.kn-IN: Idu kashta samaya endu nanage arthaaguttade. Neevu sari jagadalli bandu iddiri.
empathy.ml-IN: Ithu praayaasakaramaya samayamaanenn manassilaakkunnu. Ningal sari sthalathaan vannathu.
empathy.mr-IN: Ha kathin kaaal aahe he mi samajto. Tumhi yogya thikani aala aahat.
empathy.pa-IN: Main samjh sakda haan ke eh mushkil waqt hai. Tusi sahi jagah aaye ho.
empathy.od-IN: Mu bujhipaare ei kathin samaya. Apane thik jaaga ku aasichanti.
empathy.en-IN: I understand this is a difficult time. You've come to the right place.

silence_5s.hi-IN: Main sun raha hoon, aap boliye
silence_5s.pa-IN: Main sun riha haan, bolo ji

silence_10s.hi-IN: Kya aap sun rahe hain? Main phir se poochta hoon
silence_10s.bn-IN: Apni ki shunchhen? Ami abar jigges korchi
silence_10s.gu-IN: Tame saambhlo chho? Hu fari puchhu chhu
silence_10s.mr-IN: Tumhi aikat aahaat kaa? Mi punha vicharto
silence_10s.pa-IN: Tusi sun rahe ho? Main fir puchda haan
silence_10s.od-IN: Apane shunuchhanti ki? Mu punithare puchhe
silence_10s.en-IN: Are you there? Let me repeat that

silence_15s.hi-IN: Kya line kat gayi? Main callback kar doonga
silence_15s.ta-IN: Line cut aachcha? Naan thirumba azhaikiren
silence_15s.bn-IN: Line ki kete gelo? Ami callback korbo
silence_15s.te-IN: Line cut ayyindaa? Nenu callback chestanu
silence_15s.gu-IN: Line cut thai gai? Hu callback karu chhu
silence_15s.kn-IN: Line cut aayitaa? Naanu callback maadtene
silence_15s.ml-IN: Line cut aayi? Njaan callback cheyyaam
silence_15s.mr-IN: Line cut jhali kaa? Mi callback karto
silence_15s.pa-IN: Line cut ho gayi? Main callback kar dena
silence_15s.od-IN: Line cut heigala ki? Mu callback karibi
silence_15s.en-IN: Did we get disconnected? I'll call you back

silence_nudge.hi-IN: Main sun raha hoon, aap boliye.
silence_nudge.pa-IN: Main sun riha haan, bolo ji.

silence_welcome_reprompt.hi-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.ta-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.bn-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.te-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.gu-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.kn-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.ml-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.mr-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.pa-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.od-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.en-IN: Please say your language name, like Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.

silence_closure.hi-IN: Line cut lagti hai. Dhanyavaad, phir call kijiye.
silence_closure.ta-IN: Line cut aana madhiri irukku. Nandri, meendum azhaikkavum.
silence_closure.bn-IN: Line kete geche mone hocche. Dhonnobad, abar call korun.
silence_closure.te-IN: Line cut ayinattu undi. Dhanyavaadaalu, malli call cheyandi.
silence_closure.gu-IN: Line cut thai gai hoy em lage chhe. Aabhar, fari call karjo.
silence_closure.kn-IN: Line cut aaytu anisuttide. Dhanyavaadagalu, matte call maadi.
silence_closure.ml-IN: Line cut aayi ennu thonnunnu. Nanni, viiNdum vilikkoo.
silence_closure.mr-IN: Line cut jhali vaate. Dhanyavaad, punha call karaa.
silence_closure.pa-IN: Line cut ho gayi lagdi hai. Dhanyavaad, dubara call karo.
silence_closure.od-IN: Line cut heigala bhali laguchhi. Dhanyabaad, punithare call karantu.
silence_closure.en-IN: The line seems cut. Thank you, please call again.

restart.hi-IN: Zarur! Chaliye phir se shuru karte hain. Aapko kya jaanna hai?
restart.ta-IN: Sari! Pudidhaaga thuvanguvoam. Ungalukku enna theriya vendum?
restart.bn-IN: Obosshoi! Notun kore shuru kori. Apnar ki jante hobe?
restart.te-IN: Tappakunda! Malli modalupettudaam. Meeku emi telusukovalanukuntunnaru?
restart.gu-IN: Jarur! Chalo fari sharu kariye. Tamare shu jaanvu chhe?
restart.kn-IN: Khachitvaagi! Matte shuru maadona. Nimge enu tiliyabeku?
restart.ml-IN: Theerchayaayum! ViiduNum thudangaam. Ningalkku entha ariyaanam?
restart.mr-IN: Nakki! Punha suru karuya. Tumhala kaay jaanun ghyaychay?
restart.pa-IN: Zarur! Chalo fir toh shuru karde haan. Tuhaanu ki jaanna hai?
restart.od-IN: Nischaya! Chaalantu punarvaar aarambha karu. Apananku ki jaanibaku achhi?
restart.en-IN: Sure! Let's start over. What would you like to know?

restart_brief.hi-IN: Chaliye phir se shuru karte hain.

fallback_pardon.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, kya aap phir se bata sakte hain?
fallback_pardon.en-IN: Sorry, could you say that again?

fallback_error.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, thodi dikkat aa rahi hai.
fallback_error.gu-IN: Maaf karo, thodi taklif aavi rahee chhe.
fallback_error.pa-IN: Maafi, thodi dikkat aa rahi hai.
